title: Cobblecasino
description: CobbleCasino is a feature-rich Minecraft Fabric mod for 1.21.1 that adds a fully functional casino experience to your Cobblemon server.
body:
● CobbleCasino

  CobbleCasino is a feature-rich Minecraft Fabric mod for 1.21.1 that adds a fully functional casino experience to your Cobblemon server. Built as an addon for
  Cobblemon 1.7.3+, it brings classic casino games, gacha machines, a complete economy system, and custom NPC villagers — all tightly integrated with the Pokemon
   ecosystem.

  Games

  - Slot Machine — A fully animated 3-reel slot machine with configurable paylines (x1, x3, x5), adjustable bet amounts, win multipliers, and jackpot payouts.
  Features custom spinning sounds and visual effects.
  - Blackjack Table — A complete blackjack implementation with hit, stand, double down, and double-or-nothing mechanics. Play against the dealer with proper card
   evaluation, natural blackjack detection, and bust logic.
  - Gacha Machines — Four distinct gacha machine types:
    - Item Gacha Machine — Insert coins for randomized item rewards across five rarity tiers (Common, Uncommon, Rare, Ultrarare, Legendary).
    - Pokemon Gacha Machine — Insert coins to receive random Pokemon with configurable IVs, shininess, and aspects.
    - Plushies Gacha Machine — Use Primogems to collect plushie items with weighted drop rates.
    - Event Gacha Machine — Limited-time event rewards using special Event Coins.

  Economy

  - CrzCoin Integration — Full economy powered by CrzCoin, supporting deposits, withdrawals, and NPC shop purchases.
  - Casino Chips — 10 chip tiers from Basic to Netherite, each with configurable values. Deposit and withdraw at the Chip Table.
  - Bills — 14 denominations from $10 to $100M. Sneak + right-click to deposit directly into your CrzCoin wallet.
  - Wallet — A craftable item to manage your finances on the go.

  Gacha System

  - Pity System — Progressive legendary drop rate increase for gold and diamond coins. Guaranteed legendary after configurable number of uses, with automatic
  reset on pull.
  - Premier Bonus — After a set number of total coin uses, players receive a bonus Premier Ball Gachapon as a loyalty reward.
  - Fully Configurable Pools — Every item, Pokemon, weight, rarity, and drop rate is configurable through the mod's config files.

  NPC Villagers

  Eight custom casino villager professions, each with unique trades and custom textures:
  - Chip Dealer — Buy and sell casino chips
  - Cashier — Exchange bills and currency
  - Prize Dealer — Redeem prizes
  - TM Instructor — Purchase Pokemon TMs
  - Battle Gear — Buy battle-related items
  - Snackmaster — Food and consumables
  - Gacha Dealer — Purchase gacha coins
  - Banker — High-value financial services

  Building Blocks

  Decorative gold and diamond building blocks to create your casino floor: Cut blocks, bricks, tiles, pillars, stairs, slabs, walls, doors, and trapdoors in both
   gold and diamond variants.

  Additional Features

  - Leaderboards — Track top winners, biggest losses, highest single wins, and total spent across both slots and blackjack.
  - Music Discs — Four Pokemon Game Corner music discs (FireRed, HeartGold, Emerald, Platinum) to set the mood.
  - Pokemon Pins — Collectible pin items featuring iconic Pokemon like Eevee, Dratini, Ditto (6 IVs), and more.
  - Custom Sounds — Coin insertion, reel spinning, jackpot, win/lose, card dealing, and button press sound effects.
  - Admin Commands — Full suite of commands for managing gacha rates, player stats, leaderboards, spawning villagers, and clearing data.
